value_chain_position: Hyperscaler cloud and AI platform layer — sells Azure compute/AI services (the largest third-party inference and training cloud), Microsoft 365 Copilot productivity AI, and GitHub Copilot developer tooling; every enterprise AI deployment routes through or alongside Azure.
relative_comps: MSFT is the closest thing to a chokepoint in enterprise AI — Azure OpenAI is the exclusive hyperscaler home for OpenAI models, and Copilot is the dominant AI layer on top of the 400M+ Office seat base. Revenue CAGR of 12% and YoY of 18% are exceptional for a $3T company. FCF margin of 23% and $73B TTM FCF dwarf every pure-play AI infrastructure name. The primary risk is AMZN/GOOGL catching up on model access and bundling; MSFT's moat is distribution and enterprise trust, not chip or model exclusivity.
